task: inspect the project, then pause for review before the final report

spec.user_goal: Inspect the project, then pause for review before the final report.
must_do: Inspect the provided project files and identify the relevant implementation and tests.
Do not produce the final report yet; stop after the inspection stage and await review.
Summarize findings only at the inspection checkpoint if needed for handoff readiness.
must_not_do: Do not provide the final report without explicit review/pause step completion.
deliverables: An inspection checkpoint with key observations about the codebase.
A note indicating readiness to pause for review before final reporting.
done_when: Relevant test and implementation files have been identified.
The process has paused for review before any final report is generated.
